role: Central configuration and state directory for the ArchSpine system within a demo project.
responsibility: This directory collectively provides project-level settings (provider, scan policy, ignore chains), language detection mappings, sync health snapshots, architecture rule enforcement, and runtime checkpoint tracking to manage the ArchSpine analysis pipeline.

children.role: Central configuration file for the ArchSpine system, controlling project metadata, LLM provider, MCP context mode, pre-commit hooks, and scan policy including ignore chains and protocol boundaries.
This configuration file defines the file extension detection and language support settings for the ArchSpine analysis system.

Provides a lightweight, human-readable health-check snapshot of the ArchSpine synchronization state and project metadata. It is not the authoritative state store (which lives in cache.db) but serves as a quick overview for operators and CI systems.
Directory containing the ArchSpine architecture rule definition file.
Checkpoint records directory for the ArchSpine sync pipeline execution.
